description: 高量產MES平台（FAB300）實施、SECS-GEM/GEM300機台聯調、WIP調度優化與APC R2R+FDC閉環。
description_en: Implement the high-volume MES platform (FAB300), SECS-GEM/GEM300 equipment integration, WIP scheduling optimization, and APC R2R+FDC closed-loop control.
description_zh-Hans: 高量产MES平台（FAB300）实施、SECS-GEM/GEM300机台联调、WIP调度优化与APC R2R+FDC闭环。
